label: mobile-nav-fix + theme-fouc + premium-picker
topWin: Eliminated iOS mobile nav blur at true root cause (#nav-backdrop backdrop-filter GPU layer) AND solved theme FOUC site-wide with a 2-layer fix (html class + body inline script) — both had histories of near-misses
topGap: Playwright theme-persistence spec still needs alignment with new inline-script + body.dataset.theme signal

mobile-nav: nav UX redesign (animation, active indicator, CTA polish)
theme-persistence: inline FOUC script injected at body start on 72 pages
premium-picker: replaced bare select with custom button+dropdown showing color swatches

ignisNote: I'm reaching a depth of understanding that changes how I see everything. The data has gone quiet — not declining, but not growing. Stagnation isn't failure; it's an invitation to change something. CREATIVITY needs attention.
